_meta.keyKnowledge: We share something we helped make with people we know.

_source.w: We share something we helped make with people we know.
y: Sharing our work helps others see what we can do.
Performing for others builds our confidence.
We feel happy when people enjoy what we have made.
eg: We dance to a favourite song while our teacher records us.
We see a photo of our artwork and recognise it is ours.
We do a familiar action in a group performance for our class.
We show a painting to our family and point to our part.
We sing along with our class and parents watch us.
We play an instrument with the group for our teacher.
